fadeUp.note: Primary entrance animation for hero content. Stagger with animation-delay for sequential elements.

cardHover.note: Cards shift right slightly on hover, revealing a 3px gold accent bar on the left edge.

accentReveal.note: The left accent bar on cards — invisible by default, fades in on hover.

philosophy: Minimal, functional motion. Entrance animations establish hierarchy (hero first, then content). Hover states provide feedback without distraction. No decorative animation. Nothing bounces.
